axes.group: profitability | income | balance_sheet | growth | asset_quality | capital | liquidity_funding | efficiency | valuation | franchise | market_position | esg | macro
axes.level: bank | group (BDDK bank-type aggregate) | sector | macro
axes.availability: mandatory (regulatory disclosure) | voluntary (management/IR, bank-defined) | third_party (rating agency / TBB) | none
axes.cadence: daily | weekly | monthly | quarterly | annual | adhoc | none
axes.standard_across_banks: true if comparable like-for-like across banks; false if each bank defines it differently
axes.reproducible: direct (stored field) | derived (formula over stored fields) | partial (approx / wrong level or cadence) | no
axes.source_datasets: bank_audit | bddk_monthly | bddk_weekly | evds | tbb_digital | external | none
axes.structure: formula = math expression; frameworks = basel_iii|ifrs9|tfrs|brsa|market|management|none; decomposes_into / related = metric-id links (reproducible_from_audit is derived by scripts/metric_knowledge.py)
axes.nonstandard_reasons: definition_varies | window_varies | peer_set_varies | methodology_varies | provider_varies | cadence_irregular | scope_varies | not_disclosed — WHY a metric isn't comparable like-for-like across banks (when standard_across_banks is false)
axes.disclosure_channels: investor_deck | earnings_press | sustainability_report | annual_report | kap | third_party | regulatory | none — where the metric tends to be published
axes.definition_variants: free-text: concrete examples of how the definition/label differs across banks

metrics.definition: Net income / average equity, annualized.
metrics.derivation: net_income (P&L XXV.→XIX.) / equity (BS XVI.); annualize YTD ×(4/quarter). Sector: financial_ratios Table 15.
metrics.caveats: Audit P&L is YTD → annualize. Consolidated vs unconsolidated differ.

metrics.definition: Net income / average total assets, annualized.
Net income / average tangible equity (equity ex-goodwill/intangibles), annualized.
metrics.caveats: Intangibles are a BS line; ROTE itself is an analyst/management presentation, not a BRSA ratio.

metrics.definition: Net income / average risk-weighted assets, annualized.
metrics.caveats: Needs per-bank RWA, which lives in the capital-adequacy footnote we don't yet extract.

metrics.definition: Net interest income / average interest-earning assets, annualized.
metrics.derivation: NII annualized / avg IEA. Sector NIM in financial_ratios Table 15.
metrics.caveats: Approximate: IEA base requires choosing BS lines; banks differ slightly.

metrics.definition: NIM after reclassifying FX-swap funding cost from trading into NII (a management presentation).
metrics.caveats: Swap cost sits in trading/other in the BRSA P&L; isolating it is bank-specific. Deck: 3.3% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Average yield on interest-earning assets minus average cost of interest-bearing liabilities.
metrics.derivation: loan_yield − deposit_cost (both TTM). Surfaced as 'Loan–deposit spread' on /cross-bank + /banks/[ticker]. web/app/lib/heatmap.ts spread.
metrics.caveats: A loan-deposit spread, not the full IEA/IBL spread; differs from NIM (no non-interest-bearing-funding benefit). Yields/costs ARE broken out at BRSA P&L 1.1/2.1. Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: Interest income on loans / average loans, annualized.
metrics.derivation: TTM interest on loans (P&L 1.1 Kredilerden Alınan Faizler, YTD de-cumulated, last 4Q) / 5-point average gross loans (BS asset 2.1). web/app/lib/heatmap.ts loan_yield.
metrics.caveats: BRSA P&L line 1.1 is a stable sub-code across deposit/participation templates, so loan interest IS cleanly separable. Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: Interest expense on deposits / average deposits, annualized.
metrics.derivation: TTM interest on deposits (P&L 2.1 Mevduata Verilen Faizler, YTD de-cumulated, last 4Q) / 5-point average deposits (BS liability I.). web/app/lib/heatmap.ts deposit_cost.
metrics.caveats: BRSA P&L line 2.1 is a stable sub-code across templates. Deposit-only (not all-in funding) cost. Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: Interest income on securities / average securities, annualized.
metrics.caveats: CPI-linker income (a big component for TR banks) hinges on each bank's CPI assumption.

metrics.definition: Total assets / equity (the leverage term in the DuPont ROE bridge).
Tax expense / pre-tax profit.
Operating expenses / total operating revenue.
metrics.derivation: OPEX (P&L XI.+XII.) / gross operating revenue. /cross-bank computes this.
metrics.caveats: Revenue base (incl./excl. trading) varies slightly across banks.

metrics.name_tr: Net Ücret ve Komisyonlar / Operasyonel Giderler
metrics.definition: Net fee & commission income / operating expenses (fee-led cost coverage).
Revenue growth minus operating-expense growth (positive = operating leverage).
Operating expenses / average total assets, annualized.
metrics.derivation: Sector version (OPEX/avg assets) is financial_ratios Table 15 (ratioOpex).

metrics.definition: Operating revenue / number of employees.
metrics.caveats: Personnel count only extracted for ~16/31 banks (bank_audit_profile).

metrics.definition: Profit for the period after tax.
Total operating income (NII + fees + trading + other + dividends).
Operating revenue minus operating expenses, before loan-loss provisions.
Interest income minus interest expense.
Gross interest income (loans, securities, banks/MM).
Gross interest expense (deposits, borrowings, bonds).
Fee & commission income minus expense.
Net gains/losses on trading, FX and derivatives.
metrics.caveats: Includes swap cost — why decks show a swap-adjusted NII/NIM view.

metrics.definition: Interest income from CPI-indexed (TÜFE) government securities.
metrics.caveats: A carved-out sub-component of interest income; not a separate BRSA P&L line. Hinges on each bank's CPI valuation (Akbank 25% for 1Q26).

metrics.definition: Operating income not in NII/fees/trading (incl. recoveries).
Dividends from equity participations.
Expected-credit-loss / impairment charge through P&L for the period.
Total operating expenses (personnel + other admin + D&A).
Staff costs (salaries, benefits).
Current + deferred tax provision for the period.
Sum of all asset lines.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet roman I.–X. sum (fallback AKTİF TOPLAMI).

metrics.definition: Gross cash loans before ECL deduction.
Gross loans minus expected-credit-loss allowance.
Foreign-currency loans / total loans.
metrics.derivation: amount_fc / amount_total on the loans line.

metrics.definition: Total customer deposits.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet liabilities hierarchy I.; TL/FX via amount_tl/amount_fc.

metrics.definition: Foreign-currency deposits / total deposits.
metrics.derivation: amount_fc / amount_total on the deposits line. Sector weekly: weeklyDollarization().

metrics.definition: Demand (non-interest-bearing) deposits / total deposits.
metrics.caveats: Demand/time split not in the main per-bank BRSA balance sheet (footnote). We hold it only at SECTOR level. Deck: 33% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Total securities (TL/FX; fixed/floating/CPI-linker where disclosed).
metrics.derivation: Total = direct from BS; fixed/floating/CPI composition is footnote-only → partial.

metrics.definition: Cash + receivables from the central bank.
Placements with banks and money-market receivables.
Total risk-weighted assets (credit + market + operational risk).
metrics.caveats: Per-bank RWA now extracted (§4.1, bank_audit_capital); sector RWA in other_data.

metrics.definition: Equity minus goodwill & intangible assets.
Total shareholders' equity.
All liabilities (ex equity).
Funds borrowed + debt securities issued (on-balance wholesale funding).
Cumulative expected-credit-loss allowance on loans (BS deduction).
Guarantees, commitments and derivative notionals off the balance sheet.
metrics.caveats: We extract the off-balance statement; derivative sub-breakdown varies by bank.

metrics.definition: Period-over-period change in loans (YtD or YoY), TL & FX.
metrics.caveats: Decks cite WEEKLY solo BDDK data; we hold per-bank loans quarterly (audit), sector loans weekly.

metrics.definition: Period-over-period change in deposits (YtD or YoY).
Period-over-period change in total assets.
Period-over-period change in equity.
Year-on-year change in operating revenue.
Year-on-year change in operating expenses.
Loan growth holding the FX rate constant (strips currency translation on FX loans).
metrics.caveats: Needs the FX-loan slice deflated by USD/TRY (EVDS); approximate vs the bank's own basket.

metrics.definition: Period-over-period change in risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: Per-bank RWA now extracted.

metrics.definition: Gross non-performing (Stage 3) loans / gross loans.
metrics.derivation: credit_quality npl_brsa_gross / loans_gross. Sector: financial_ratios Table 15.

metrics.definition: NPL net of its specific provisions / gross loans.
Loan gross carrying amounts split by IFRS 9 stage.
Stage 1 (performing) loans / gross loans.
Stage 2 (significant increase in credit risk) loans / gross loans.
(Stage 2 + Stage 3 loans) / gross loans.
Total ECL allowance / Stage 2+3 (or gross) loans — total provisioning cushion.
Stage 3 provisions / Stage 3 (NPL) loans.
Stage 2 ECL / Stage 2 loans.
Provisions / loans on a base the bank chooses (Stage-3, or total provisions over Stage 2+3).
metrics.caveats: NOT standardized — 'coverage' means different ratios at different banks. Deck 27.6% (total) vs our Stage-3 65.4%.

metrics.definition: Loan-loss provisioning expense / average loans, annualized.
metrics.derivation: TTM ECL provisions (P&L IX., magnitude) / 5-point average gross loans (BS asset 2.1). web/app/lib/heatmap.ts cost_of_risk.
metrics.caveats: Banks differ on gross vs net of recoveries and currency-impact adjustments. Our figure is gross ECL provisions (line IX.), not adjusted for FX impact.

metrics.definition: Cost of risk net of recoveries and currency hedge gains.
metrics.caveats: The recovery/hedge adjustment is a management figure; only approximable from statements.

metrics.definition: Gross new loans flowing into Stage 3 in the period.
Recoveries/collections on non-performing loans in the period.
NPLs written off or sold in the period.
NPLs that returned to performing / opening NPL stock.
metrics.caveats: Approximable from npl_movement transfers; banks define 'cure' differently.

metrics.definition: Closely-monitored / Stage 2 loans flagged as watchlist / gross loans.
metrics.caveats: Often equated with Stage 2, but banks apply their own watchlist definitions.

metrics.definition: Restructured loans / total loans.
metrics.caveats: Footnote/IR disclosure, definitions vary. Deck: 3.8% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Total ECL allowance / gross loans (total provisioning intensity).
Total regulatory capital / risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: Basel III. Now extracted per-bank from the §4.1 capital-adequacy table (bank_audit_capital).

metrics.definition: Tier 1 capital (CET1 + AT1) / risk-weighted assets.
Tier 2 (supplementary) capital / risk-weighted assets.
Common Equity Tier 1 capital / risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: Per-bank from bank_audit_capital (§4.1); sector CET1 in other_data (BDDK table 12).

metrics.definition: AT1 instruments (e.g. perpetual subordinated notes) / risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: AT1 issuance is IR news; the ratio is now derivable from bank_audit_capital. Deck: AT1 +103bp to CAR (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Total liabilities / equity (accounting gearing).
metrics.derivation: metrics.ts leverage() computes this at sector level.

metrics.definition: Tier 1 capital / total (non-risk-weighted) exposure.
metrics.caveats: Basel III leverage ratio (3-month avg) now extracted per-bank; distinct from accounting leverage.

metrics.definition: Risk-weighted assets / total assets (average risk weight).
metrics.caveats: Per-bank RWA now in bank_audit_capital; sector ratio also via ratioRwaDensity.

metrics.definition: Conservation + countercyclical + D-SIB buffers above Basel minima.
metrics.caveats: Regulator-set; disclosed in IR (deck p15: conservation 2.50%, D-SIB 1.50%, countercyclical 0.01%).

metrics.definition: Capital ratio minus the regulatory minimum incl. buffers (headroom).
metrics.caveats: CAR is now in bank_audit_capital, but the regulatory minimum + buffers (the subtrahend) aren't stored, so the surplus is only approximable.

metrics.definition: Retained earnings as a contribution to capital ratios (organic capital build).
metrics.caveats: Now derivable: per-bank capital and RWA are in bank_audit_capital.
metrics.derivation: Retained-earnings contribution to capital ratios; capital + total_rwa now in bank_audit_capital.

metrics.definition: Loans / deposits.
TL loans / TL deposits.
FX loans / FX deposits.
High-quality liquid assets / 30-day net cash outflows.
metrics.caveats: Per-bank LCR (total + FC) now extracted from the §4.7 liquidity table (bank_audit_liquidity).

metrics.definition: Available stable funding / required stable funding.
metrics.caveats: Per-bank NSFR now extracted (bank_audit_liquidity).

metrics.definition: Customer deposits / total assets (funding mix quality).
metrics.caveats: Deck: 64% of assets funded by deposits (1Q26).

metrics.definition: External borrowings (syndications, bonds, AT1) maturity profile and FX liquidity buffer.
metrics.caveats: On-balance borrowings are extractable (borrowings); the maturity profile + FX buffer are IR-only (deck p10/p21).

metrics.definition: Stock of HQLA eligible for the LCR.
metrics.caveats: Reported only inside the LCR disclosure; not extracted.

metrics.definition: Borrowings + interbank liabilities / total funding.
Share price × shares outstanding.
metrics.caveats: Needs equity-market (BIST) price data we don't ingest.

metrics.definition: Market cap / book equity.
metrics.caveats: Book value (equity) we have; market cap we don't.

metrics.definition: Market cap / trailing net income.
Equity / shares outstanding.
metrics.caveats: Equity we have; share count we don't ingest.

metrics.definition: Net income / weighted shares outstanding.
metrics.caveats: Reported in IFRS statements, but share count isn't in our extracted tables.

metrics.definition: Dividend per share / share price.
Dividends paid / net income.
metrics.caveats: Dividend decisions are KAP disclosures; we don't capture the payout amount.

metrics.definition: Share-price change + dividends over a period.
Customers active on digital channels in a trailing window.
metrics.caveats: THE canonical non-comparable customer metric: each bank defines 'active'/window differently; not a statement item. We hold TBB digital at SECTOR level only. Deck: 15.5 mn (1Q26).
definition_variants: 'active' window differs across banks: last 1m / 3m / 12m
some count log-ins, others any transacting customer
'digital' = mobile+internet for some, mobile-only headline for others

metrics.definition: Total active banking customers across all channels (a franchise-size headline).
metrics.caveats: Bank-defined; not disclosed on a fixed cadence or consistent basis. Watch the registered-vs-active distinction.
definition_variants: 'active' threshold differs (any product held vs transacted in a window)
individual-only vs incl. corporate/SME
registered vs active conflated by some banks

metrics.definition: Digitally-active customers / total active customers (or digital share of transactions/sales).
metrics.caveats: Deck cites e.g. >95% of credit cards sold digitally; definitions vary by bank.
definition_variants: numerator basis differs: digitally-active customers, digital share of transactions, or digital share of product sales
denominator = active customers vs total customers

metrics.definition: Customers active on the mobile app in a trailing window.
metrics.caveats: TBB publishes mobile vs internet at SECTOR level; per-bank is IR-only.
definition_variants: mobile-only vs mobile+tablet app
active window differs

metrics.definition: Share of credit-card volumes/outstanding (issuing/acquiring).
metrics.caveats: Sourced from BKM (card-scheme body), which we don't ingest.
definition_variants: issuing volume vs acquiring volume vs outstanding balances vs number of cards
share of total cards vs share of turnover; peer set differs

metrics.definition: Card & payment transaction volume processed.
metrics.caveats: BKM/IR disclosure; not in our datasets.
definition_variants: acquiring (merchant) volume vs issuing (cardholder) spend
physical POS only vs incl. e-commerce / virtual POS

metrics.definition: Customers receiving salary through the bank (a stickiness/low-cost-deposit proxy).
definition_variants: count of payroll customers vs payroll market share vs salary-inflow volume
metrics.caveats: Disclosed irregularly; a stickiness / low-cost-deposit proxy. Bank-defined.

metrics.definition: Customer-advocacy survey score.
metrics.caveats: Survey-based, methodology differs by bank/vendor.
definition_variants: survey vendor & sample differ (in-house vs Ipsos/Nielsen)
overall NPS vs segment/journey NPS
a rank ('#1 in NPS') reported instead of the score

metrics.definition: Number of branches (domestic/foreign) and employees.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_profile (qualitative section). Extracted for ~16/31 banks; rest use unparsed phrasings.

metrics.definition: Customers enrolled in digital channels (cumulative sign-ups), distinct from active users.
definition_variants: registered/enrolled vs active conflated
cumulative sign-ups vs current enrolled base
metrics.caveats: Often quoted alongside (and confused with) active digital customers; a larger, looser number.

metrics.definition: Number of ATMs / self-service machines in the network.
definition_variants: ATMs only vs incl. cash-recycling machines / kiosks
owned vs shared-network
metrics.caveats: Sometimes in the audit qualitative profile, but not a standardized statement line.

metrics.definition: Number of physical POS terminals deployed at merchants.
definition_variants: physical POS only vs incl. virtual / softPOS
installed vs active terminals
metrics.caveats: BKM/IR disclosure; we don't ingest it.

metrics.definition: Total payment cards in force (credit + debit + prepaid).
definition_variants: total cards vs active cards
incl./excl. virtual & prepaid
metrics.caveats: BKM card-scheme data; not in our datasets.

metrics.definition: Credit cards in force.
definition_variants: cards in force vs active cards vs new issuance in period
metrics.caveats: BKM/IR; not ingested.

metrics.definition: Debit cards in force.
definition_variants: in force vs active
metrics.caveats: BKM/IR; not ingested.

metrics.definition: Number of merchants / member businesses in the acquiring network.
definition_variants: merchants vs member businesses (üye işyeri) vs active merchants
metrics.caveats: IR/BKM; bank-defined.

metrics.definition: Public app-store rating of the bank's mobile app.
definition_variants: iOS App Store vs Google Play rating
rating vs #downloads vs MAU cited
metrics.caveats: From app stores; banks cite their better platform. Not in our datasets.

metrics.definition: Total number of employees (FTE / headcount).
metrics.derivation: bank_audit qualitative profile (same source as branches_personnel); partially extracted.
metrics.caveats: Regulatory profile figure; standardized but only partially parsed today.

metrics.definition: Number of SME customers served (a franchise-breadth / inclusion headline).
definition_variants: SME definition (turnover threshold) differs by bank
customers vs active borrowers
metrics.caveats: Bank-defined SME boundary; not standardized.

metrics.definition: Number of agricultural / farmer customers (a financial-inclusion headline, esp. state banks).
definition_variants: farmers vs agri-SMEs vs agri-loan borrowers
metrics.caveats: Prominent for Ziraat/Halkbank; bank-defined scope.

metrics.definition: A bank's loans / a peer aggregate's loans.
metrics.caveats: Deck uses Akbank SOLO weekly BDDK ÷ private banks; we hold Akbank solo only quarterly (audit). Deck: 12.7% (1Q26).
definition_variants: peer set differs: vs sector, vs private banks, vs deposit banks
TL-only vs total loans; solo vs consolidated
segment cuts (SME #1, retail #2) cited selectively

metrics.definition: A bank's deposits / a peer aggregate's deposits.
metrics.caveats: Same cadence/peer-set caveat as loan_market_share. Deck cites TL demand-deposit share gains.
definition_variants: total deposits vs TL vs demand deposits vs SME deposits
peer set differs (sector vs private banks)

metrics.definition: A bank's NPLs / sector (or peer) NPLs (lower = relative quality).
metrics.caveats: Deck: NPL market share 14.4%, improved 360bp since 2024 (1Q26).
definition_variants: share of sector NPL stock vs share of new NPL inflow
peer set differs

metrics.definition: A bank's total assets / sector total assets.
metrics.caveats: Bank assets (audit, quarterly) / sector assets (bddk_monthly 10001) is cleanly computable BY US vs the whole sector; banks themselves cite it against varying peer bases.
definition_variants: vs whole sector (our derivation) vs vs deposit banks vs vs private banks

metrics.definition: AuM and market positions of subsidiaries (asset mgmt, pension, leasing, brokerage).
metrics.caveats: IR disclosure (AK Portföy AuM 1,416 bn; pension 452 bn / 19.3% share; leasing 12.4%), not statement lines.
definition_variants: which subsidiaries are included differs (asset mgmt, pension, leasing, brokerage, factoring)
AuM vs market share vs revenue contribution

metrics.definition: Rankings in DCM/ECM/M&A/bond issuance underwriting.
metrics.caveats: From data providers (e.g. Dealogic) / IR; we don't ingest. Deck: 46% share in private-sector bond issuance (1Q26).
definition_variants: league-table provider differs (Dealogic, Bloomberg, Refinitiv)
product scope (DCM only vs all-bonds vs M&A) differs
domestic vs international issuance

metrics.definition: Third-party sustainability scores (MSCI, Sustainalytics, CDP, Refinitiv).
metrics.caveats: Different providers, different scales; published by rating agencies. Deck p27.
definition_variants: MSCI AAA-CCC, Sustainalytics risk score (lower=better), CDP A-D, S&P Global 0-100 — not comparable scales
banks cite whichever provider scores them best

metrics.definition: Cumulative/period green & sustainable financing provided.
metrics.caveats: Bank-defined taxonomy; IR/sustainability-report disclosure.
definition_variants: cumulative since a base year vs annual flow
bank-defined green taxonomy (no common standard)
incl./excl. sustainability-linked (use-of-proceeds vs KPI-linked)

metrics.definition: GHG emissions attributable to the loan/investment book (PCAF).
metrics.caveats: Methodology (PCAF) evolving; sustainability-report only.
definition_variants: sector/portfolio coverage differs (which books are measured)
PCAF data-quality score / data vintage differs
absolute tCO2e vs intensity (per TL lent)

metrics.definition: Green, social or sustainability-linked bonds issued.
metrics.caveats: Deal-level IR/KAP disclosure (deck p21: IFC gender-equality digital bond).
definition_variants: green vs social vs sustainability vs SLB lumped or split
single deal vs cumulative program size

metrics.definition: Share of women in workforce / management / board.
metrics.caveats: Sustainability-report disclosure; scope (workforce vs board) varies.
definition_variants: scope differs: total workforce vs management vs senior management vs board
headcount share vs new-hire share

metrics.definition: Share of women on the board of directors.
definition_variants: full board vs board committees
count vs %
metrics.caveats: Board membership is in KAP filings, but the % is a reported sustainability figure.

metrics.definition: Stated net-zero / emission-reduction commitment (target year & scope).
definition_variants: operational (Scope 1-2) vs financed (Scope 3) net-zero
target year differs (2050 / 2053 / ...)
absolute vs intensity reduction
metrics.caveats: A commitment, not a measured value; scope & base year vary widely.

metrics.definition: ESG / sustainability-linked loans extended (KPI-linked pricing or use-of-proceeds green loans).
definition_variants: use-of-proceeds green loans vs KPI-linked SLLs
cumulative vs annual
metrics.caveats: Overlaps sustainable_finance_volume; bank-defined taxonomy.

metrics.definition: CBRT one-week repo auction rate.
Consumer price inflation (YoY).
metrics.derivation: EVDS TP.FG.J0 YoY. Drives CPI-linker income.

metrics.definition: Turkish lira per US dollar.
CPI-based real effective exchange rate (real appreciation backdrop).
Gross reserves and net CBRT TL funding (liquidity stance).
Real GDP growth (YoY).
metrics.caveats: TÜİK national accounts; not currently in our EVDS series set.

metrics.definition: ROE deflated by inflation - the return in real terms; a headline framing for Turkish banks under high CPI.
metrics.caveats: Which inflation rate / nominal vs inflation-accounting base varies. Garanti & Isbank both guide to a 'positive real ROE' for 2026.

metrics.definition: NIM normalized to strip the CPI-linker valuation swing (and incl. swap cost) - the underlying margin trend.
metrics.caveats: Each bank normalizes with its own CPI assumption (Garanti/YK/Isbank/Halkbank all report a 'core'/normalized NIM, differently).

metrics.definition: NII (incl. swap cost) + net fees - revenue excluding volatile trading/other.
metrics.caveats: Banks vary on whether swap cost / net CPI impact is in or out (Garanti 'Core NII excl. net CPI'; YK 'NII+swap+fees').

metrics.definition: Blended interest cost of all interest-bearing funding (deposits + wholesale), annualized.
metrics.caveats: IBL base and treatment of demand deposits vary by bank (Isbank publishes a sector WACF).

metrics.definition: Non-interest-bearing funding (equity + demand deposits, net of non-earning assets) supporting the margin.
metrics.formula: (equity - reserve_req - net_npl - subsidiaries - fixed_assets + demand_deposits) / avg_IEA
metrics.caveats: Garanti's bespoke construct (Free funds/Avg IEA = 25%, 1Q26); the exact deduction set is bank-defined.

metrics.definition: Gross new NPL inflows minus collections (the net pace of NPL creation); as a rate, over average performing loans.
metrics.caveats: YK reports 'Net NPL Formation' (TL); Isbank a 'Net NPL Formation Rate' (/avg performing loans). Write-off/NPL-sale adjustments vary.

metrics.definition: Change in the capital ratio per a 10% TL depreciation (FX stress sensitivity).
metrics.caveats: IR disclosure; sign/scope vary (Garanti +12bps CAR per 10% TL depr.; YK CET-1 -30bps).

metrics.definition: Unrealized mark-to-market gain/loss on the securities book (mostly FVOCI), net of tax - held in equity/OCI.
metrics.caveats: In the equity/OCI footnote; we extract the BS but not always this sub-line. YK: -14.2bn TL (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Gross loans / total assets - the balance-sheet tilt toward lending vs securities/liquidity.
metrics.caveats: Garanti highlights ~56% (bank-only 58%) vs sector ~50% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Pre-provision operating profit / average total assets, trailing twelve months — underlying earning power before credit costs.
metrics.derivation: TTM (VIII Gross Operating Profit − |XI+XII opex|) / 5-point average total assets. web/app/lib/heatmap.ts ppop_ratio.
metrics.caveats: Shown on /cross-bank + /banks/[ticker] on a TTM basis (NIM/ROA there are annualized-YTD). Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: A bank's total assets as a share of the reporting banks' combined assets that quarter.
metrics.derivation: Per period, bank assets (Σ BS asset Romans I.–X.) ÷ sum across reporting banks. web/app/lib/market-share.ts.
metrics.caveats: Denominator is the ~32 audited banks (~98% of sector), not the BDDK sector aggregate — 'share of reporting banks'. Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: A bank's gross loans as a share of the reporting banks' combined loans that quarter.
metrics.derivation: Bank gross loans (BS asset 2.1) ÷ sum across reporting banks per period. web/app/lib/market-share.ts.
metrics.caveats: Share of reporting banks (~98% of sector). Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: A bank's deposits as a share of the reporting banks' combined deposits that quarter.
metrics.derivation: Bank deposits (BS liability I.) ÷ sum across reporting banks per period. web/app/lib/market-share.ts.
metrics.caveats: Share of reporting banks (~98% of sector). Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: Sum of squared market shares (×10,000) across reporting banks — sector concentration. <1500 unconcentrated, 1500–2500 moderate, >2500 concentrated.
metrics.derivation: Computed for assets/loans/deposits from the market-share panel. web/app/lib/market-share.ts hhiSeries().
metrics.caveats: Over the reporting-bank universe; excludes the ~2% of sector outside the audited set. Built 2026-06-20.

metrics.definition: On- plus off-balance-sheet foreign-currency assets minus FC liabilities (net of FX derivatives) — the bank's net currency exposure.
metrics.derivation: GROUNDWORK ONLY — disclosed in the §4 market-risk footnote (currency-risk table) + the off-balance/derivatives tables, currently captured unstructured in other_data. See docs/knowledge/data-gaps-roadmap.md.
metrics.caveats: Not yet extracted into a structured table; needs a §4 currency-risk extractor (deterministic pdfplumber/fitz, no LLM).

metrics.definition: Rate-sensitive assets minus rate-sensitive liabilities by repricing/maturity bucket (<1m, 1–3m, …) — interest-rate and liquidity mismatch.
metrics.derivation: GROUNDWORK ONLY — §4 interest-rate-risk and liquidity-gap footnote schedules. See docs/knowledge/data-gaps-roadmap.md.
metrics.caveats: Narrative footnote table; not extracted. Asset/liability maturity ladders also live here.

metrics.definition: Long-term issuer/credit rating and outlook from an agency (Fitch, Moody's, S&P, JCR Eurasia, SAHA).
metrics.derivation: GROUNDWORK ONLY — agency press releases / KAP rating disclosures, modelled as a per-bank rating-action events table. See docs/knowledge/data-gaps-roadmap.md.
metrics.caveats: Scales differ by agency; the sovereign ceiling caps most TR bank ratings.

metrics.name_tr: Devlet Tahvili Getiri Eğrisi / Reel Faiz
metrics.definition: Turkish government bond benchmark yields by tenor and the implied real rate (nominal − expected inflation).
metrics.derivation: GROUNDWORK ONLY — some benchmark yields are in EVDS; the full curve + CDS/OIS are market data (paywalled). See docs/knowledge/data-gaps-roadmap.md.
metrics.caveats: CDS and OIS stay out of scope (Bloomberg/OTC). Real rate derivable once a benchmark-yield series lands.
